step_by_step_thinking: ICD-10 refers to the "International Statistical Classification of Diseases and Related Health Problems, 10th Revision." This is consistently referenced throughout the evidence, particularly in relation to the classification of gestational duration, livebirth outcomes, respiratory disorders, and tumor types. All references explicitly mention "International Statistical Classification of Diseases and Related Health Problems," confirming that the correct option must reflect this full name.
raw_response:
ICD-10 refers to the "International Statistical Classification of Diseases and Related Health Problems, 10th Revision." This is consistently referenced throughout the evidence, particularly in relation to the classification of gestational duration, livebirth outcomes, respiratory disorders, and tumor types. All references explicitly mention "International Statistical Classification of Diseases and Related Health Problems," confirming that the correct option must reflect this full name.
\boxed{C}
